h1: How to Generate Gerber in Cadence Allegro

headings.text: How to Generate Gerber in Cadence Allegro

sections.heading: How to Generate Gerber in Cadence Allegro
sections.text: Blog > How to Generate Gerber in Cadence Allegro How to Generate Gerber in Cadence Allegro by: PCBWay Dec 09,2022 13790 Views 0 Comments Posted in Help Center 1. Check the PCB status, and make sure that the displayed results are all green. 2. Double-check for Database Check . 3. Gerber output settings. 4. Generate Drill file: Click [ Manufacture->NC->NC Drill ] Generate Drill Legend: Click [ Manufacture->NC->Drill Legend ] 5. Generate Gerber file. 6. Send the following files to PCBWay for Quick Order . Enter the year of your birth and check your Chinese Zodiac. Join us Wanna be a dedicated PCBWay writer?
